what_i_built: An AI-powered BI consulting tool. Describe your business problem and tech stack, get a full strategy: architecture diagrams (Mermaid.js), change management roadmap, prioritized recommendations, and a printable report for management. The most ambitious project on the site by far.
what_was_tricky: The prompt engineering. Getting an LLM to produce structured JSON that's both valid and genuinely insightful — not just generic consulting fluff — took careful system prompt design. The architecture diagram generation was the hardest part: Mermaid.js syntax is finicky and the model loves to produce invalid diagrams. I had to add graceful fallback for when the diagram can't render.
fun_facts: 727 lines of frontend + 150 lines of Azure Function backend
First project that calls an external AI API
The system prompt is basically a senior consultant's brain compressed into 500 words
The requester (Bas) is an actual BI expert — no pressure
Print mode hides all the chrome and produces something you could genuinely hand to a CTO
